headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund slumped to a 3-1 loss at Mainz 05 on Saturday, a fourth consecutive defeat on the road in the Bundesliga this season which left them seventh in the standings.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ten-man Dortmund slump to 3-1 loss at Mainz

video.headline: Paul Nebel gets on the scoresheet for Mainz

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Paul Nebel gets on the scoresheet for Mainz) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

headlines.description: Bayern Munich earned a nervous 1-0 win at St Pauli thanks to a sensational strike fromJamal Musiala to stay unbeaten and open a six-point lead atop the Bundesliga on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Musiala stunner sees Bayern edge St. Pauli

video.headline: Jamal Musiala scores a brilliant goal from outside the box

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Jamal Musiala scores a brilliant goal from outside the box) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

headlines.description: Koji Miyoshi scored an 89th minute goal to give strugglers VfL Bochum a 1-1 draw against visiting champions Bayer Leverkusen in the Bundesliga on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen denied win by late Bochum strike

video.headline: Patrik Schick finds the back of the net for Bayer Leverkusen

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Patrik Schick finds the back of the net for Bayer Leverkusen) 2024/11/09 ESHEET
